meaning: n.复印本,多种adj.多种形式的,有许多部分的,多方面的vt.复写,繁殖,增多
examples: The moves in chess are not only manifold, but involute.
Gaelic can be heard here in manifold forms.
The layers of middle-men between a consumer of healthcare and a provider are manifold.
They are crucial in all sorts of ways because of the manifold services they provide.
